'''kochasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:judgable|judgable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-ch-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:judgable|judgable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kochasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kochasithi|kochasithi]] || [[word:kochasiji|kochasiji]] || [[word:kochasishi|kochasishi]] || [[word:kochasiki|kochasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kochasuthuthu|kochasuthuthu]] || [[word:kochasujuju|kochasujuju]] || [[word:kochasushushu|kochasushushu]] || [[word:kochasukuku|kochasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kochasuthu|kochasuthu]] || [[word:kochasuju|kochasuju]] || [[word:kochasushu|kochasushu]] || [[word:kochasuku|kochasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kochasufthuf|kochasufthuf]] || [[word:kochasufjuf|kochasufjuf]] || [[word:kochasufshuf|kochasufshuf]] || [[word:kochasufkuf|kochasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kochasethe|kochasethe]] || [[word:kochaseje|kochaseje]] || [[word:kochaseshe|kochaseshe]] || [[word:kochaseke|kochaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kochasothotho|kochasothotho]] || [[word:kochasojojo|kochasojojo]] || [[word:kochasoshosho|kochasoshosho]] || [[word:kochasokoko|kochasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kochasotho|kochasotho]] || [[word:kochasojo|kochasojo]] || [[word:kochasosho|kochasosho]] || [[word:kochasoko|kochasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kochasofthof|kochasofthof]] || [[word:kochasofjof|kochasofjof]] || [[word:kochasofshof|kochasofshof]] || [[word:kochasofkof|kochasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kochasïfthïf|kochasïfthïf]] || [[word:kochasïfjïf|kochasïfjïf]] || [[word:kochasïfshïf|kochasïfshïf]] || [[word:kochasïfkïf|kochasïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kochasïfthïfthïf|kochasïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:kochasïfjïfjïf|kochasïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:kochasïfshïfshïf|kochasïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:kochasïfkïfkïf|kochasïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kochasïfthïf|kochasïfthïf]] || [[word:kochasïfjïf|kochasïfjïf]] || [[word:kochasïfshïf|kochasïfshïf]] || [[word:kochasïfkïf|kochasïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kochasïfthïf|kochasïfthïf]] || [[word:kochasïfjïf|kochasïfjïf]] || [[word:kochasïfshïf|kochasïfshïf]] || [[word:kochasïfkïf|kochasïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kochasæthæ|kochasæthæ]] || [[word:kochasæjæ|kochasæjæ]] || [[word:kochasæshæ|kochasæshæ]] || [[word:kochasækæ|kochasækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kochasathatha|kochasathatha]] || [[word:kochasajaja|kochasajaja]] || [[word:kochasashasha|kochasashasha]] || [[word:kochasakaka|kochasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kochasatha|kochasatha]] || [[word:kochasaja|kochasaja]] || [[word:kochasasha|kochasasha]] || [[word:kochasaka|kochasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kochasafthaf|kochasafthaf]] || [[word:kochasafjaf|kochasafjaf]] || [[word:kochasafshaf|kochasafshaf]] || [[word:kochasafkaf|kochasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kochasasha|kochasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kochashësha|kochashësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kochasrosha|kochasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kochasmusha|kochasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kochasyasha|kochasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokochasnkshësha|gokochasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokochasnkrosha|gokochasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokochasnkmusha|gokochasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokochasnkyasha|gokochasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kochachasasha|kochachasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kochachashësha|kochachashësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kochachasrosha|kochachasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kochachasmusha|kochachasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kochachasyasha|kochachasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokochachasnkshësha|gokochachasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokochachasnkrosha|gokochachasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokochachasnkmusha|gokochachasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokochachasnkyasha|gokochachasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kechæsasha|kechæsasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kechæshësha|kechæshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kechæsrosha|kechæsrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kechæsmusha|kechæsmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kechæsyasha|kechæsyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokechæsnkshësha|gokechæsnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokechæsnkrosha|gokechæsnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokechæsnkmusha|gokechæsnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokechæsnkyasha|gokechæsnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kochfasasha|kochfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kochfashësha|kochfashësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kochfasrosha|kochfasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kochfasmusha|kochfasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kochfasyasha|kochfasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokochfasnkshësha|gokochfasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokochfasnkrosha|gokochfasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokochfasnkmusha|gokochfasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokochfasnkyasha|gokochfasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
